CustomField.description: RO-2858 — Current commission %. Cascading check against Partner_Booking_Within_Contract__c: if >= Threshold 3 then Kickback 3 AE, else if >= Threshold 2 then Kickback 2 AE, else if >= Threshold 1 then Kickback 1 AE, else Basis AE.
CustomField.formula: IF( Partner_Booking_Within_Contract__c >= Partner_Kickback_Threshold_3__c, Partner_Kickback_3_AE__c, IF( Partner_Booking_Within_Contract__c >= Partner_Kickback_Threshold_2__c, Partner_Kickback_2_AE__c, IF( Partner_Booking_Within_Contract__c >= Partner_Kickback_Threshold_1__c, Partner_Kickback_1_AE__c, Partner_Basis_AE__c )))
CustomField.label: Partner Current AE
